changes: Changed parent class from AppCompatActivity to ComponentActivity
Updated class documentation to mention Hilt annotation
Removed all ConstraintLayout constraint attributes (Bottom, End, Start, Top)
file_insights.significance: MEDIUM - Layout changes unrelated to primary task

changes: Kept existing md_theme_primary definition with same value
file_insights.significance: LOW - Possible duplicate or color consolidation

patterns_discovered.description: Using @AndroidEntryPoint annotation for constructor-based dependency injection
patterns_discovered.relevance: Architecture pattern for modern Android development

patterns_discovered.description: Primary task (add annotation) expanded to include layout and resource changes
patterns_discovered.relevance: Single commit contains multiple unrelated modifications

gotchas_discovered.description: Using android:layout_gravity in ConstraintLayout is ineffective; ConstraintLayout requires constraint attributes
gotchas_discovered.impact: Text centering may not work as intended - ConstraintLayout ignores gravity attributes

gotchas_discovered.description: Commit mixes DI framework setup with unrelated UI layout changes
gotchas_discovered.impact: Makes version history harder to follow; harder to revert individual changes if needed

gotchas_discovered.description: Primary color added alongside existing md_theme_primary with identical hex value
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential maintenance confusion - unclear which color definition should be used

approach_outcome.primary_objective_description: @AndroidEntryPoint annotation successfully added to MainActivity with proper imports and base class change
approach_outcome.secondary_modifications: Layout and color files modified beyond scope of primary task
approach_outcome.overall_assessment: Primary task completed successfully, but commit contains unrelated changes that should have been separated

recommendations.details: Replace android:layout_gravity with proper ConstraintLayout constraints (constraintStart_toStartOf, constraintEnd_toEndOf, constraintTop_toTopOf, constraintBottom_toBottomOf) to center the text properly
Create separate commits for: (1) Hilt DI setup, (2) Layout refactoring, (3) Color definitions
Decide whether to use 'primary' or 'md_theme_primary' and consolidate to single definition
Add inline comments explaining why ComponentActivity is preferred over AppCompatActivity for Hilt integration

recommendations.recommendation: Consider reverting layout changes if unrelated to feature
recommendations.details: If layout modifications are not required for Hilt integration, revert to original ConstraintLayout implementation
